title: JSON wrong bottler name, label correct (distance-downsample, level 10, tilt-right)
image_prompt: Photorealistic heavy glass bottle with a rustic, frontier-style label. Verbatim text to include exactly: 'Prairie Wind', 'Straight Bourbon Whiskey', '45% Alc./Vol.', '750 mL', 'Distilled and bottled by Prairie Wind Distilling Co., Omaha, NE'. Include a separate paragraph in small print: 'GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.'
visualObservation: Visual note: label was photographed from too far away with severe downsampling. Camera orientation is tilt-right (15 degrees).
